notes.scope: Only tested assertions fulfilled by fix-validation-failures features (enhance-l5-full, fix-l9-s7-content). Other failed assertions (VAL-CONTENT-001, VAL-CONTENT-002) are from pdf-extraction milestone and not addressed by this milestone.
